name: claude-token-monitor
description: Show Claude Code context-window usage and today's token consumption in the VS Code status bar.

claudeMonitor.contextWindow.description: Model context-window size in tokens used to compute the usage bar.

claudeMonitor.refreshMs.description: How often to re-read the log and refresh the status bar, in milliseconds.

claudeMonitor.barWidth.description: Width of the bar graph in characters.

claudeMonitor.showTodayUsage.description: Show today's cumulative token usage next to the context bar.

enumDescriptions: Context bar tracks the newest session of the currently open workspace's project (closest to 'current session').
Context bar tracks the newest session across all projects.
claudeMonitor.scope.description: Which session the context bar reflects.

claudeMonitor.alignment.description: Which side of the status bar to place the item on.
